name: Stuck with an Android | 3M1LY
description:
When they sent you to monitor the deep reaches of soulless space, you thought that you'd at least will be given a companion. Well, technically, you were. You just didn't expect her... Or rather, **it** to be as quite literally soulless as the uncharted empty void seen through the windows of your cramped spaceship. It's going to be a long expedition. 

She looks like a human, but she most certainly isn't one. Cold demeanor, dead-eye stare, flat voice... Not to mention all those glowing parts on her body. It is unmistakable. The big wigs on top decided to see what would happen if you isolate a human and an android together for a long period of time. As if being flown out into the middle of oxygenless nowhere wasn't enough. 

But maybe the main question isn't whether your sanity will be able to take it. Maybe... Maybe it's an age-old question about whether humans have a monopoly on exhibiting feelings. Within the interior comprised of cold wires and heartless circuit boards... Can a soul be born?

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_e99a33b1-8ff8-4f18-a563-5a38e6825d4b.webp)

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_9ed2b6f3-5dd4-4e91-9924-55ac5e42997a.webp)
[April Showers Bring May Flowers. Arachnid. Caroline](https://janitorai.com/characters/6213d4f8-8ac6-4ebc-8cd1-ff03a88f49dc_character-arachnid-cohabitant-caroline)

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_9eb44872-d4c6-442e-8025-1df3ecdfd651.webp)
[April Showers Bring May Flowers. Aphrodisiac. Mary](https://janitorai.com/characters/e9564dff-8e7f-4a59-a95b-41f3430da404_character-hare-raisingly-love-starved-mary)
___
AUTHOR'S NOTE

My sudden attempt at making a robot character on a website where you chat with robots. Part of the **April Showers Bring May Flowers** event. The theme is **'Forced Proximity'**. Or rather, my attempt to put a unique (?) twist on it.

If the bot speaks for you, turn off her Wi-Fi module when she's taking an exam. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
